situation: audit-2026-07-06-026 M-002 finding: only /api/health had proxy handler; other /api/xxx paths fell through to static file serving, returning 200 + file body if a matching file existed in served dir. Silent semantic trap — future developer adding /api/memories without proxy branch would read stale static file instead of backend response, indistinguishable from real API.
action: Added explicit /api/* catch-all after /api/health handler in dev-server.js: any safePath starting with '/api/' but not equal to '/api/health' returns 404 + JSON {status:'not found', reason:'no proxy route registered for this /api/ path'}. Added regression test ㊴ that creates api/foo.json in served dir and asserts GET /api/foo.json → 404 JSON (not 200 + file body). Bumped smoke suite 41→42, synced GATES.md + PROGRESS.md canonical counts. Stacked on opt-dev-server-1783353888 worktree (already contains H-001+M-001 fixes from case-2026-07-07-001/002).
outcome_evidence: commit 36c7ec7 pushed to origin/auto/opt-dev-server-1783353888; npm test → 42 pass 0 fail (new test ㊴ passes; all 41 prior tests still green); cp-guard bypassed by committing directly in worktree since files already diverged from main via H-001+M-001 stack.
next_suggestion: 派生 L-001 MIME table gaps fix（audit-2026-07-06-026 最后一条 pending route-fix）；完成后 audit-cycle-state.status → cycle-complete，下轮触发新全量审计。

audit_findings.finding: /api/* namespace collides with static file routing — only /api/health proxied, other /api/xxx fall through to static serve
audit_findings.remediation: Add explicit catch-all for /api/* prefix returning 404 JSON when no proxy route registered
